summary: End-to-end testing of WorkshopOps. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests pass (health, auth gate, jobs CRUD with status flow pending→in_progress→completed, search, filters, stats, role-based delete, _id leak). Frontend (Expo web mobile viewport 390x844): login screen renders with hero/badge/feature row/Google CTA, root redirects to /login when unauthenticated. After bypassing auth via Playwright route interception (Bearer test-owner-token-001), dashboard, jobs list (search + status filters), add-intake form (validation + submit creates job), and job detail (status flow, mechanic findings, spare parts add/save) all work. testIDs present on every interactive element. No deprecated expo packages (expo-av/barcode/background-fetch) found. No React Native red-screen errors.

issues: User name shows first-word + '.' (e.g. 'Test.' for 'Test Owner') — intentional per code (app/(tabs)/index.tsx:68) but worth confirming with PM/UX

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — emitted by a third-party RN dep, not blocking. No code change needed in app code.

action_items: Optional: confirm dashboard user-name truncation to first word + '.' is intentional (app/(tabs)/index.tsx:68).

Optional: AsyncStorage on web uses IndexedDB so test agents must inject Authorization via network route interception (documented in this iteration) rather than localStorage; consider a __DEV__ helper to set token via URL param for easier QA.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ[...] (fail-fast) for MONGO_URL & DB_NAME — good.
All responses use {_id: 0} projection — verified no _id leakage.
JobUpdate is properly partial via Optional[...]; status uses Literal so invalid status returns 422.
Owner/mechanic role enforcement is centralized in delete_job — works as designed.
Frontend api.ts cleanly reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, clears token on 401, handles JSON errors. Good.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/seed_test_users.py (new — seeds test owner + mechanic users/sessions per /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Seeded users.user_test_owner (role=owner, token=test-owner-token-001) and users.user_test_mechanic (role=mechanic, token=test-mech-token-001) in MongoDB. Test data prefixed 'TEST_' cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and reuse seeded tokens. Run `python /app/backend/tests/seed_test_users.py` once, then `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. For frontend UI testing without real Google OAuth, use Playwright `page.route('**/api/**', ...)` to inject `Authorization: Bearer test-owner-token-001` header — localStorage injection does NOT work because AsyncStorage web-shim uses IndexedDB, not localStorage. Tab labels are uppercase: DASH, JOBS, INTAKE, PROFILE. Job detail accessible via /jobs → row click; status set via testIDs `set-status-{pending|in_progress|completed}`.
